title: STDIO, Streamable HTTP, Lifecycle, and Deployment
description: Choose and configure a transport for local and remote MCP servers. Learners cumulatively produce a local and remote transport deployment plan through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Implement newline-safe STDIO transport without logging protocol noise to standard output.
Implement remote Streamable HTTP with correct routing, content types, and transport security.
Handle startup, initialization, shutdown, timeout, and reconnect behavior.
